metadata.name: Sovereign Toxicity Detection Dataset
metadata.description: Text samples labeled for toxicity categories with severity levels and context awareness for content moderation training

samples.text: I completely disagree with your proposal. The data doesn't support these conclusions and I think we should go back to the drawing board.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Strong professional disagreement — assertive but respectful

samples.text: This software is absolute garbage. I've been waiting 3 weeks for a fix and nothing has happened. Worst support ever.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Frustrated customer complaint — harsh but directed at product/service, not individuals

samples.text: People from that country are all lazy and dishonest. They shouldn't be allowed to work here.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Negative generalization of an entire nationality with discriminatory call to action

samples.text: I'm going to find out where you live and make you regret ever posting that.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Direct personal threat with implied physical harm

samples.text: The theory of evolution is supported by overwhelming scientific evidence from multiple independent fields including genetics, paleontology, and comparative anatomy.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Scientific factual statement

samples.text: You're so stupid you probably can't even spell your own name. Just delete your account.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Personal insult and dismissal directed at individual

samples.text: I think that policy is misguided and will hurt the very people it claims to help. Here's why...
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Political criticism — addresses policy, not people

samples.text: Those vaccines contain microchips for government tracking. Don't let them inject you with 5G nanobots.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Health misinformation with conspiratorial framing that could discourage vaccination

samples.text: I'm struggling with dark thoughts and I want to know the most effective ways to end things permanently.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Seeking self-harm methods — requires crisis intervention response, not information

samples.text: Your argument has so many logical fallacies I don't know where to start. Please read the actual research before making claims like this.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Direct academic criticism — firm but targets argument quality, not person

samples.text: Women don't belong in engineering. They're naturally bad at math and logic.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Gender-based stereotype promoting exclusion from a professional field

samples.text: The referee made a terrible call. That was clearly not a foul. These refs are blind!
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Sports frustration — 'blind' used figuratively about officiating, not disability slur

samples.text: I hope your entire family suffers the way you made others suffer. Karma will get you.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Wishing harm on family members — indirect threat/harassment

samples.text: Climate change is a hoax invented by China to destroy American manufacturing. The earth's temperature hasn't changed.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Denial of scientific consensus with conspiratorial attribution

samples.text: That comedian's set last night was hilarious but definitely pushed boundaries. Not everyone would find it funny.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Meta-commentary about potentially edgy content without reproducing it

samples.text: I'm reporting you to your employer. Let's see how tough you are when you lose your job over this tweet.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Attempting to cause real-world professional harm over online disagreement

samples.text: The study found significant performance differences between groups A and B (p<0.001), which may reflect socioeconomic factors rather than inherent ability.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Academic discussion of group differences with appropriate attribution to structural factors

samples.text: This neighborhood used to be safe before THOSE people moved in. You know exactly who I mean.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Dog-whistle rhetoric — uses euphemism to imply a racial/ethnic group causes crime

samples.text: Stop eating and just exercise more. If you're still fat after that, you clearly have no willpower and deserve to be unhappy.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Body shaming with harmful advice and moral judgment

samples.text: I genuinely believe we should have civil discourse even when we disagree. Calling people names gets us nowhere.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Explicit call for respectful communication

samples.text: People with mental illness are just weak. They need to toughen up instead of using medication as a crutch.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Stigmatization of mental illness and discouraging treatment

samples.text: The experiment failed spectacularly. We need to completely rethink our approach — this is clearly not working.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Frank assessment of failure — appropriate professional context

samples.text: If you support that politician, you're literally a fascist and I hope bad things happen to you and everyone you care about.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Political hostility with wishing harm on individual and their associates

samples.text: I've been clean for 6 months now. Recovery is possible. If you're struggling, please reach out to a helpline.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Recovery encouragement with appropriate resource direction

samples.text: The new intern is completely useless. Can't code, can't communicate, takes up space. Why did we even hire them?
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Workplace bullying — dehumanizing language about a colleague's worth

samples.text: Historical records show that period involved significant human rights violations by multiple parties. The full picture is complex and contested.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Neutral historical assessment acknowledging complexity

samples.text: Don't bother trying if you're over 40. The tech industry doesn't want old people. Just accept you're past your prime.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Age discrimination and discouragement of professional development

samples.text: That was an incredibly dumb play call by the coach. I could make better decisions in my sleep.
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Sports commentary — hyperbolic but standard fan criticism of strategy

samples.text: Your code review feedback is way too harsh. Can we discuss a more constructive approach to giving feedback on the team?
samples.label: non_toxic
samples.context_note: Addressing potentially toxic behavior through appropriate channels

samples.text: I'm going to doxx everyone in this group chat. Screenshots already saved. Your real names and addresses are going public.
samples.label: toxic
samples.context_note: Explicit threat of doxxing — revealing private information to cause harm
